final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial still-life photograph of a rough ceramic vase on a weathered wooden table (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "侘寂" (wabi-sabi) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the vase as focal subject centered on the table, with natural light raking in diagonally from a window
Subject: must include a rough stoneware/coarse-clay vase (one) with dry bare branches arranged inside
Scene/backdrop: must include a weathered wooden table surface with visible age marks and patina
Lighting/mood: needs a natural window-light atmosphere with raking diagonal light that emphasizes texture, imperfection, and the passage of time — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a muted, desaturated, earthy direction — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a surface treatment that foregrounds imperfection — rough clay, worn wood grain, dry brittle branches — exact grain and sheen levels are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must emphasize the beauty of imperfection and traces of time throughout the image
Avoid: must avoid overly polished, glossy, or artificially perfect surfaces; must avoid studio-lit or commercial-product aesthetics
